title: ハッピー呼び込む勝負服☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey has been in top condition since
receiving her signature racewear. Fans are even
starting to recognize her too. When I mention this
to her...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yay! Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Super effective!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My signature racewear, of course! It's designed to
use feng shui to attract heaps of happiness!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The main colors are yellow, which represents joy
and brings good fortune, and red, which increases
luck in competitions.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There are also four petals on the waist to bring
good luck. I think that detail has boosted my
fortunes and gotten me more fans. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I painted my nails a bright blue to ward off
any bad qi.
choice_data_list: You really put a lot of thought into it.
You really put a lot of thought into it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep! If I win wearing signature racewear that
incorporates feng shui, everyone'll want to know
more about it, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And on top of that... I'm hoping I can clear up
people's misconceptions about feng shui a little.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui is the study of environmental luck that
draws out happiness, and it's based in theory and
calculations. But the public perception of it is the
exact opposite, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
People think it's sketchy and fake... Some people
even call it a scam.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But people only think that because they're doing
it wrong or because they give up too fast, before
they've seen any results.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: And those misconceptions end up disappointing the new people trying feng shui and old masters like my dad. That's what always got me, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Young Rickey
text_block_list.text: Whimper... But feng shui's a science for making people happy! And everyone wants to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Young Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do it, Dad! I'll show the whole world
the right way to do feng shui and make everyone
happy!

text_block_list.name: Rickey's Dad
text_block_list.text:
I see. Well, doing that might take some time, but
if anyone can do it, it's you, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Young Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll teach people all about feng shui and
then they'll all be happy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's when I became really devoted to feng shui.
I read lots of specialist books and tried out
methods from all kinds of different schools.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yep! I did all that to make everyone happy!
choice_data_list: Then let's go win a bunch of races!
Then let's go win a bunch of races!
I bet your dad will be happy too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yep! I did all that to make everyone happy!
choice_data_list: Then let's go win a bunch of races!
Then let's go win a bunch of races!
I bet your dad will be happy too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! And that's why I need to get started on
some serious training!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I have a suggestion... Can we try
incorporating more feng shui into my new training
plan?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Exposure to the morning sun boosts energy, so
maybe we can move our indoor training to the
afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Also, since the metal element also represents
muscles, strength training should be done facing
west—the direction that heightens metal qi...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And there are all kinds of other ways feng shui
can be helpful! But what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is working hard to realize her
dream. Wanting to help her to the best of my
ability, I listen carefully to her suggestions.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I hope so!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My dad always tells me that if I find something I
want to do besides feng shui, then it's okay for
me to go ahead and do it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But feng shui's definitely what I want to do! The
direction of my dream's already decided!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...And my dad always looks so happy whenever he
talks about feng shui with me. And then when my
mom sees him like that, she looks really happy
too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: And seeing them both happy makes me happy...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's just like the five elements—happiness
circulates too! I believe that if feng shui spreads,
the circle of happiness will get wider with it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's spread the circle of happiness across the
whole world, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is striving toward her dream.
Seeing her, I feel even more determined to
support her the best I can.
